original_image_tags: A scan of a single page of aged, off-white paper. Two punch holes are visible at the top center. The page contains typed text in a typewriter font, centered in the upper portion. The lower two-thirds of the page is blank. A faint, curved line or mark is visible near the bottom left corner, and a vertical line along the right edge suggests the edge of the paper or a scan border.

elements.description: A single page containing typed text. Visible text includes 'TT Conf 193', '23 Dec 48', 'Incident 221', 'OSAF ITEM 5 / RESTRICTED /', and a brief message regarding the 'Midland, Michigan' incident addressed to 'HQ AMC ATTENTION: PROJECT "SIGN"'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text with no photographs or diagrams, but Description B provides specific quoted text details absent in Description A.
